---
title: "Byeong-Hak"  
about:
  template: trestles  # jolla  trestles  solana  marquee  broadside
  image: img/bchoe2020sq.png
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round # rectangle  round  rounded
  
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/byeonghakchoe/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/bclog1
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resumé
      href: https://bclog1.github.io/choe-cv.pdf
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:bchoe@geneseo.edu

---

Byeong-Hak is an Assistant Professor of Data Analytics and Economics at SUNY Geneseo. My fields of interest are economics of climate change.

## Education

University of Wyoming | Tempe, AZ <br>
Ph.D. in Economics | Aug 2016 - Aug 2021 <br>
Arizona State University | Tempe, AZ <br>
M.S. in Economics | Aug 2014 - Dec 2015 <br>
State University of New York at Stony Brook | Stony Brook, NY <br>
M.A. in Economics | Aug 2012 - May 2014 <br>

## Experience

SUNY Geneseo | Assistant Professor of Data Analytics and Economics | Sep 2023 - present
